category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a unit testing framework for Bourne-based shell scripts; official GitHub README describes shUnit2 as xUnit-style shell testing.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is shUnit2; source_facts.name is shunit2.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README includes quickstart and function reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/kward/shunit2, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says shUnit2 is an xUnit unit test framework for Bourne-based shell scripts and includes quickstart/test-running documentation.
